channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: US vows to target more Iranian infrastructure as nations seek to open Hormuz - Reuters
item.description:
1. US vows to target more Iranian infrastructure as nations seek to open Hormuz  Reuters
  2. Trump threatens to strike Iran's bridges and electric power plants  Reuters
  3. Trump Warns US 'Hasn't Even Started' To Destroy Iran, Says Regime Must Act 'Fast'  Radio Free Europe/Radio Liberty
  4. Trump threatens to "obliterate" Iran's energy and water infrastructure  Axios
  5. Trump renews threat to Iran's power plants as war sends oil prices soaring again  CBS News

item.description:

  4. 70% of teens in Australia still access social media despite bans  Social Media Today

item.title: Over 100 International Law Experts Warn: U.S. Strikes on Iran Violate UN Charter and May Be War Crimes - Just Security
item.description:
1. Over 100 International Law Experts Warn: U.S. Strikes on Iran Violate UN Charter and May Be War Crimes  Just Security
  2. Opinion | Why the International Criminal Court Isn’t Taking On Iran  WSJ
  3. The U.S.-Iran War Is Illegal. Here’s Why That Matters.  inthesetimes.com
  4. A war without accountability: why the Middle East crisis is also a legal quagmire  The Conversation
  5. INTERVIEW - Ban US from using Germany’s bases for Iran war: Opposition to Merz government  Anadolu Ajansı

item.title: Putin warns Armenia it can’t be both a member of EU and Russia-led economic bloc - AP News
item.description:
1. Putin warns Armenia it can’t be both a member of EU and Russia-led economic bloc  AP News
  2. Armenia Cannot Be in Both EU and Moscow-Led Customs Bloc, Putin says  themoscowtimes.com
  3. Russian-Armenian talks  Президент России
  4. Putin Confronts Pashinyan Over Election Rules and Armenia’s Westward Drift  Kyiv Post
  5. Armenia Sets Sights on EU—Not Russia, as Pashinyan and Putin Meet in Moscow  UNITED24 Media

item.title: Iran launches biggest salvo of missiles in three weeks at Israel, military officials say - Euronews.com
item.description:
1. Iran launches biggest salvo of missiles in three weeks at Israel, military officials say  Euronews.com
  2. Iran Continues Strikes on Gulf States, Israel After Trump’s Address  WSJ
  3. Iranian missiles strike 9 sites across greater Tel Aviv, damaging train station and building: Reports  Anadolu Ajansı
  4. Waves of Iranian, Houthi Missile Attacks Target Central Israel, Five Wounded  Haaretz
  5. Iranian cluster munitions cause heavy damage to vehicles, buildings across central Israel  The Jerusalem Post

item.title: From international outcast to mediator in Iran war, Pakistan's remarkable makeover - Reuters
item.description:
1. From international outcast to mediator in Iran war, Pakistan's remarkable makeover  Reuters
  2. How Pakistan won over Trump to become an unlikely mediator in the Iran war  BBC
  3. Pakistan to continue with Iran-US mediation despite ‘obstacles’  Al Jazeera
  4. Islamabad talks signal emergence of new four-nation bloc in Middle East  The Guardian
  5. Pakistan is playing peacemaker in one war while fighting another  NBC News

item.title: Ukraine war latest: An-26 crash in occupied Crimea kills Russian general, BBC reports - The Kyiv Independent
item.description:
1. Ukraine war latest: An-26 crash in occupied Crimea kills Russian general, BBC reports  The Kyiv Independent
  2. 29 killed after military plane crashes into cliff  Cleveland.com
  3. Russian military transport plane crashes in Crimea, killing 29, Defense Ministry says  cnn.com
  4. At least 29 dead after Russian military plane crashes in Crimea  The Guardian
  5. BBC Russia reports Russian Northern Fleet general killed in An-26 crash  Meduza

item.title: Iran Update Special Report, April 1, 2026 - Institute for the Study of War
item.description:
